intro: Heat shimmers off the cracked flats. A lone figure stands in your path, hand hovering, and the only sound is the wind.
speaker: Outlaw
introDialogue: You and me, stranger. One draw, half of all you're carrying on the line - {{ante}} apiece. Fastest hand takes the lot. My draw's quicker than it looks... pick your partner, if you've got the nerve.
title: High Noon
description: An outlaw calls you out for a single-strike duel - and the stake is HALF your money ({{ante}}). Pick ONE Pokemon; only its Speed is put to the test against his draw, and his is no slouch. Out-draw him and you walk with the pot. Lose and the stake is gone. Or walk away.
invalidSelection: That Pokemon is in no shape to draw.

1.label: Take the duel
1.tooltip: (?) Stake half your money. Send your quickest draw - his is faster than he lets on.
1.selected: You step into the flats and square off...

2.label: Walk away
2.selected: You tip your hat and back away. The outlaw lets you go.

win: Your Pokemon draws first! The outlaw freezes, beaten, and tosses you the pot with a grudging nod.
lose: Too slow - the outlaw's draw lands first. You forfeit your ante and trudge on.
